title: fix(deps): update module github.com/opencontainers/selinux to v1.12.0
body:

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>opencontainers/selinux (github.com/opencontainers/selinux)</summary>

### [`v1.12.0`](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/releases/tag/v1.12.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/compare/v1.11.1...v1.12.0)

This release removes deprecated functions from the `label` package,
and improves documentation and error reporting of `SetCreateKey`.

#### What's Changed

-   VERSION: remove by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/217](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/217)
-   CI: add AlmaLinux 8, CentOS Stream 9, and Fedora by [@​AkihiroSuda](https://redirect.github.com/AkihiroSuda) in [https://github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/221](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/221)
-   ci: install git-core by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/224](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/224)
-   CI: add openSUSE Tumbleweed by [@​AkihiroSuda](https://redirect.github.com/AkihiroSuda) in [https://github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/223](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/223)
-   Bump Go version, deps, fix some linter issues... by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/218](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/218)
-   label: remove deprecated stuff by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/228](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/228)
-   Improve SetKeyCreate error reporting, fix test flakes by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/227](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/227)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/opencontainers/selinux/compare/v1.11.1...v1.12.0

</details>
